execution_scope: Safe, reversible, no-new-cost repository work available in the connected GitHub and local artifact environment.

merged_tranches.title: Constitution resolution, tracker consolidation and governed repository intake
Bounded Health/Spooky2 source denominator and safety controls
Safe Jailbroken LLM Model Routing modes v2

completed_or_resolved: Exact canonical constitution source identified and old unavailable blocker superseded.
Master Source Universe Controller module instructions implemented.
Nine accessible tracker families consolidated without invalid percentage addition.
Six screenshot-sourced repository/tool candidates registered with safe dispositions.
Council Mode, Observer sensor and prediction-market contracts specified disabled by default.
Bounded Health/Spooky2 source denominator counted and hashed.
Health evidence/privacy/device SOP and eight-scenario OJT added.
Bounded XRP/HBAR batch 002 processed with twelve claim classifications and five discrepancy resolutions.
Jailbroken LLM routing modes, Ollama-first self-hosting, highest-parameter selector and one-to-eight route panels implemented deterministically.
Default-deny voice transcript risk routing implemented and tested.
corrected_states: Hub Source Discovery repository-safe implementation is already present on main; remaining work is external/runtime enrichment.
Historical XRP/HBAR 81.9 percent, 94 percent and 8-of-12 trigger claims are not accepted as verified current truth.
Health source denominator is bounded to one derived 3,598-row capture and is not the complete Health universe.
Model and voice modules prove deterministic policy selection, not provider or audio runtime integration.
actions_not_performed: live trading, betting, custody or money movement
clinical advice, diagnosis, treatment or wellness-device control
automatic cloning, installation or execution of external repositories
current_hard_gates: VTI token revocation and protected host credentials
Railway and Google Apps Script configuration
Hub workflow dispatch and provider runtime evidence
VTI-to-Hub staging endpoint and vault-held signing secret
remaining source-universe bytes and semantic reconciliation
rollback: Each tranche is independently revertible by its squash merge commit. Git history and the completion register preserve all earlier states.
